reasoning: I have waited five years to see my citizenship papers in my hand, and I am still waiting. But I do not have to wait to see my daughter in college—that is real, that came to me through Mamata's scheme. Shantanu is from the Thakurbari, yes, and my husband believes in his promises, but I believe in what reaches my house. My daughter's fees, my son's bicycle, my ration—these came under this government, and I have no proof that CAA papers will come if I change now. Sandeshkhali was a terrible thing, and yes, there is corruption everywhere, but my family's bread comes from the schemes that are already working. I will vote for what I can touch, not what I am still waiting for.
primary_drivers: Kanyashree and Sabuj Sathi schemes that have already reached my household
CAA promises unfulfilled after 5 years—papers still not in my hand
Pragmatism: my daughter's education is more certain than citizenship documents
